TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Sam_Anderson, title = Sam_Anderson, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Sam_Anderson} }

S.FORM: Sam Anderson kawas tay 1945, ryax sa tay 13 nqu tay 5, Sam Anderson, squliq na Bunge'. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors
Sam Anderson kawas tay 1945, ryax sa tay 13 nqu tay 5, Sam Anderson, squliq na Bunge'. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors
S.PHON: s~ɕam an*ers~ɕon kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, s~ɕam an*ers~ɕon, s~ɕquliq na βuŋeʔ. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* aʦ~ʨtors~ɕ
